assumptions: The developer has a supported browser and can receive email when the selected route requires it.
No platform account, tenant, credentials, or product resources exist yet.
Developer has an email address to use as a sender signature

developer_goal: Send transactional email using Postmark's API or SDKs to verify successful email delivery.

first_success.outcome: Developer sends a test transactional email that is accepted by Postmark and visible in the Postmark UI or confirmed by API response
first_success.observable_signal: API response indicates success with a message ID; email appears in Postmark activity or test inbox

route_selection.rule: Reconstruct complete official candidate routes, prefer no payment/admin/approval when possible, then minimize required actions; leave consequential ties unresolved.

candidates.name: SMTP integration
candidates.reason: While SMTP is supported and enabled by default for quick setup, the official docs recommend using the REST API and official SDKs for deeper integration and advanced features.

prerequisites.description: Create a Postmark account by signing up at postmarkapp.com and verifying the account email.
Create a Postmark server (sub-account) within the account to organize sending environments.
Obtain a Server API token from the Postmark server's API Tokens tab for authentication.
Add and confirm a sender signature email address to use as the 'From' address in emails.
Understand basic API usage or SDK usage to send an email through Postmark.

external_gates.description: Creating and verifying a Postmark account requires email confirmation.
Sender signature email address must be confirmed via a confirmation email before use.
Domain verification requires adding DKIM and SPF DNS records to the domain's DNS provider.
API requests require a valid Server API token in the HTTP header for authentication.

platform_outcomes.description: Successfully send an email through Postmark using the API or SDK

uncertainties.question: Has the machine-drafted Postmark route been independently shortest-path audited?
uncertainties.impact: Action counts and peer comparison must stay withheld until a human audit passes.
uncertainties.evidence_needed: Complete a shortest-path audit against current official docs and mark verified only when evidence supports it.
